modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to activate the Zoom AI Companion feature.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to use the Zoom application for a meeting and heard about this cool AI Companion feature. I really wanted to turn it on, but I couldn't figure out how to do it. I looked everywhere in the settings, but it just wasn't clear to me. It would be great if someone could help me with this!
short_description: Unable to activate the Zoom AI Companion feature.
